The color "Primrose Pink" typically refers to a shade of pink that resembles the color of primrose flowers. Primrose Pink is a soft and delicate shade of pink with subtle hints of yellow. It is often described as a pale, pastel pink or a light rosy hue. The name "Primrose" is derived from the flower Primula, which blooms in various shades of pink, including this soft pink color. Primrose Pink is associated with feelings of sweetness, femininity, and tenderness.
What type of color is "Siesta" color?

The color "Siesta" is a warm, earthy shade that typically falls in the orange-brown color spectrum. It is reminiscent of the warm hues seen during a midday nap or siesta, hence the name. Siesta can vary in intensity and undertones, with some versions leaning more towards a reddish or rusty tone, while others lean towards a more golden or sandy hue. It is a soothing and calming color that often evokes a sense of relaxation and tranquility.
